description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a striking black-and-white color palette. The structure features expansive floor-to-ceiling windows on multiple sides, allowing for abundant natural light and seamless indoor-outdoor integration. The backyard includes a landscaped garden, a swimming pool, lounge chairs, and a shaded seating area, all surrounded by mature trees for privacy. The front facade is defined by a sleek black exterior, a gated driveway, and a small lawn with minimalistic landscaping. The house includes multiple balconies and terraces, as well as a visible garage area. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a strong connection to the outdoor environment.
description: A modern two-story house with flat roofs, large glass windows, and a black-and-white exterior, featuring landscaped gardens, a pool, and multiple terraces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black facade, gated driveway, garage, and a small lawn with minimal landscaping.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard with a swimming pool, lounge chairs, shaded seating, and extensive greenery.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the large glass windows, balconies, and dense tree coverage along the property edge.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the terrace, additional garden space, and the rear portion of the house with more windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with a flush door, no steps, and a small overhang, integrated into the black facade with a gated driveway.
